hero.availability: Available for freelance work, collaborations & consultations
hero.name: Matt Roshay
hero.description: An AI Enablement & Product Builder designing

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm an AI Enablement specialist and full-stack developer. After 15 years in business development and client relationship management at international law firms (Herbert Smith Freehills, Freshfields & Covington), I now help teams design and ship AI-enabled workflows — translating fuzzy business asks into working automations, integrations, and products. I build with APIs, n8n, Make, Dust, Claude, and modern web frameworks, and bring senior-stakeholder experience most freelance devs don't.

aiWorkflow.title: AI Workflow Design & Implementation
aiWorkflow.description: Designing AI-enabled workflows that think — from first webhook to final action. APIs, n8n, Make, Dust, Claude. I build automations that actually get used, not dashboards that collect dust.

webDev.title: Full-Stack Web & App Development
webDev.description: Modern web apps and internal tools — Ruby on Rails, React/TypeScript, PostgreSQL. From MVPs to production-ready products.

aiConsulting.title: AI Integration & Consulting
aiConsulting.description: Adding AI features to existing products — OpenAI, Claude APIs, RAG patterns, prompt engineering. I help teams go from AI curiosity to shipped features.

discovery.title: Discovery & Scoping
discovery.description: Figuring out what to build is often harder than building it. I help teams map current workflows, surface real inefficiencies, and scope realistic AI and automation projects — with clear success criteria — before any code gets written. 15+ years translating fuzzy business asks into concrete deliverables inside complex organisations.

cta.title: Ready to build something amazing?
cta.description: Let's collaborate to bring your ideas to life with cutting-edge technology and thoughtful design.

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.description: A carefully curated toolkit that enables me to build exceptional digital experiences from concept to deployment.

philosophy.title: My Development Philosophy
philosophy.description: I believe in writing clean, maintainable code that scales. Every project is an opportunity to learn something new and push the boundaries of what's possible on the web. I stay current with emerging technologies while maintaining a strong foundation in proven solutions. My goal is to deliver not just functional software, but delightful user experiences that drive real value.

projects.title: Featured Work
projects.description: A collection of projects that showcase my passion for creating exceptional digital experiences with modern technologies.

bitconsulting.title: B-itconsulting
bitconsulting.description: Portfolio + blog CMS for an IT infrastructure consultant with LinkedIn auto-posting, content management, and responsive design.

matchmeal.title: MatchMeal
matchmeal.description: AI-powered recipe app that identifies ingredients and suggests personalized meals using OpenAI API. Features image uploads, favorites, and adaptive UI.

flatrent.title: FlatRent
flatrent.description: Full-stack booking platform inspired by Airbnb — my Le Wagon capstone, built with Ruby on Rails. Property listings, authentication, search filters, and reservation management. Deployed on Heroku.

contact.title: Let's Build Something Amazing
contact.description: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Let's discuss how we can bring your vision to life with cutting-edge technology and thoughtful design.

form.title: Send a Message
form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project, timeline, and any specific requirements...

info.title: Get in Touch
info.description: Whether you're a startup looking to build your first product or an established company needing to modernize your web presence, I'm here to help.
info.locationValue: Saint Médard en Jalles, France / Remote
info.quickResponseDescription: I typically respond within 24 hours. For urgent projects, feel free to call directly and we can set up a quick chat.

footer.description: AI Enablement & Product Builder — shipping AI-enabled workflows, integrations, and full-stack web applications.
